## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt` clean, `go vet` passes, `go build` succeeds (api/)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `tsc --noEmit` pass, `npm run build` succeeds (web/)
- [ ] No secrets or personal paths added (gitleaks clean)
- [ ] Docs / `.env.example` updated if config changed
